Collection.title: Collection
Collection.description: Represents a user-defined collection of repositories.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the collection was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the collection was last updated.

itemCount.description: The number of items in the collection.

color.description: A color associated with the collection.

CollectionItem.title: CollectionItem
CollectionItem.description: Represents a single item within a user's collection, which is a GitHub repository.

id.description: Unique identifier for the collection item (e.g., 'github_12345').

collectionId.description: The ID of the parent collection.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns the collection.

type.description: The type of the saved item.

addedAt.description: Timestamp when the item was added to the collection.

itemData.description: A snapshot of the original item's data (a Repository object).

addedAt.description: The timestamp when the repository was added to the CollectionRepository.

stars.description: The number of stars the repository has.

language.description: The primary programming language of the repository.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the application. Authentication data is not stored here.

UserArchive.title: UserArchive
UserArchive.description: Represents a user's archived repository and its metadata.

id.description: Unique identifier for the archive, typically owner_repo.

userId.description: The ID of the user who archived this repository.

repoFullName.description: The full name of the repository (e.g., 'owner/repo').

ownerAvatarUrl.description: Denormalized URL of the owner's avatar.

archivedAt.description: The timestamp when the repository was first marked as archived.

archivedStars.description: The number of stars the repository had when it was archived.

archivedVersion.description: The version/tag of the repository when it was archived.

archivedCommit.description: The latest commit hash of the repository when it was archived.

archiveSize.description: The size of the local archive in megabytes.

lastChecked.description: The timestamp when the repository was last checked for updates.

currentStars.description: The current number of stars for the repository.

currentVersion.description: The current version/tag of the repository.

currentCommit.description: The current latest commit hash of the repository.

hasUpdate.description: Flag indicating if an update is available.

updateType.description: The type of update available (major, minor, patch, commit).

changesSummary.description: An AI-generated summary of the changes in the update.

localPath.description: The local file path where the repository is cloned.

isCloned.description: Flag indicating if the repository is currently cloned locally.

lastPulled.description: The timestamp when the local repository was last pulled.

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: Represents a single chat conversation with the AI assistant.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this conversation.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the conversation was last updated.

lastMessage.description: A snippet of the last message for display purposes.

messages.description: The history of messages in the conversation.

AssistantMessage.title: AssistantMessage
AssistantMessage.description: Represents a single message within an AI conversation.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

content.description: The text content of the message.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the message was created.

results.description: Optional: An array of rich search results (Repository objects) associated with the message.

searchType.description: Optional: The type of search that produced the results.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection containing user profile information. Authorization: Only the user can read/write their own profile.

/users/{userId}/collections/{collectionI.description: Subcollection containing collections created by the user. Authorization: Only the user can read/write their own collections.
Subcollection containing the items (repos, models, etc.) within a user's collection. Authorization: Only the user can manage items in their own collections.

/users/{userId}/archives/{archiveId}.description: Subcollection containing repositories archived by the user. Authorization: Only the user can read/write their own archives.

/users/{userId}/conversations/{conversat.description: Subcollection containing the user's AI chat conversation history. Authorization: Only the user can read/write their own conversations.

/repositories/{repositoryId}.description: Collection of Github repositories. Repositories stored here can be added to a user's collection.
